_doc: Curated regime windows for evaluation. Pick representative bull / bear / choppy periods that the underlying LLM has not memorized.

regimes.label: Tariff-led correction Q1 2025
regimes.notes: Trump tariff announcements. Bear market test for the agent.

_extension: Add new regimes here. Always pick windows AFTER the LLM training cutoff (model_cutoff < window.start) to avoid contamination.
